title: lasiagrostis splendens
intro: Lasiagrostis splendens, also known as Splendid Grass or Chinese Needle Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lasiagrostis splendens include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to be consumed for its medicinal properties.
